productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Casual Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and offering great Fit, this casual shoe makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Full grain leather upper with a suede wraparound overlay at the backfoot Padded fabric inner lining for breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with the word SPORT forming the lugs for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Clean the suede overlay with a suede brush Do not store in direct sunlight
